member.name: P:CustomFee.FeeCollectorAccountId
member.summary: The account to receive the custom fee

member.name: P:CustomFee.AllCollectorsAreExempt
member.summary: If true, exempts all the token's fee collection accounts from this fee. (The token's treasury and the above fee_collector_account_id will always be exempt. Please see HIP-573 for details.)

member.name: M:CustomFee.FromProtobufInner(Proto.CustomFee)
member.summary: Convert the protobuf object to a custom fee object.

member.name: M:CustomFee.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert byte array to a custom fee object.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:CustomFee.DeepCloneList(System.Collections.Generic.IList{CustomFee})
member.summary: Create a new copy of a custom fee list.

member.name: M:CustomFee.ValidateChecksums(Client)
member.summary: Verify the validity of the client object.
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:CustomFee.FinishToProtobuf(Proto.CustomFee)
member.summary: Finalize the builder into the protobuf.

member.name: M:CustomFee.ToProtobuf
member.returns: the protobuf for the custom fee object

member.name: M:CustomFee.ToBytes
member.returns: the byte array representing the protobuf
